title: MFA (Multi-Factor Authentication) Setup and Troubleshooting
text:
Q: How do I set up and troubleshoot Multi-Factor Authentication (MFA)?
A: To set up Multi-Factor Authentication (MFA), start by logging into your company account. Windows: Open your web browser and navigate to the company login page. After entering your credentials, you will be prompted to set up MFA. Choose your preferred method (e.g., mobile app, SMS, or email) and follow the on-screen instructions to complete the setup. macOS: Similarly, open your web browser and go to the company login page. After logging in, follow the prompts to select and configure your MFA method. If you encounter issues during setup, ensure your mobile device is connected to the internet and that you have the latest version of the authentication app installed. Windows: If you are not receiving SMS codes, check your mobile number in your profile settings. macOS: If you are having trouble with the authentication app, try reinstalling it or clearing its cache. For further assistance, contact the IT helpdesk with details of the issue you are experiencing, including any error messages.
